# Hardware / vcan capture playbook.
#
# Format:
# id|setup|capture_command|stimulus|expected_observation|reduction_rule|promotion_gate
#
# `id` must match a row in capture_requirements.txt. This file is not evidence;
# it is the executable plan for collecting future evidence without changing the
# claim boundary. Keep commands concrete enough that another operator can run
# the capture and reduce it into tests/fixtures/traces/.
vcan_address_claim|Linux vcan0 configured with 250 kbit/s-equivalent SocketCAN defaults and optional socketcan_monitor observer in a second shell|candump -td -L vcan0|Run examples/socketcan_address_claim on vcan0 while examples/socketcan_monitor observes the same interface|At least one extended Address Claimed frame PGN 0xEE00 from the machbus preferred address and matching monitor summary|Keep the first valid Address Claimed frame plus enough context to identify the source address|make trace-replay-demo plus hardware-evidence-check with a reduced-hardware manifest row
vcan_dm1|Linux vcan0 configured and observable from candump plus optional socketcan_monitor second shell|candump -td -L vcan0|Run examples/socketcan_address_claim long enough for the demo DM1 emission while examples/socketcan_monitor observes the same interface|At least one extended DM1 frame PGN 0xFECA carrying SPN 100 FMI 1 or its TP reassembly if multi-packet and matching monitor summary|Keep the Address Claimed frame and the smallest DM1 frame sequence that proves the DTC|make trace-replay-demo plus a capture report naming the decoded SPN/FMI
physical_address_claim|Isolated 250 kbit/s CAN/ISOBUS segment with termination and no production implement attached|candump -td -L can0|Run examples/socketcan_address_claim on can0 after physical preflight|Analyzer and candump both observe Address Claimed PGN 0xEE00 with matching extended ID/source|Keep preflight notes plus the first matching Address Claimed frame|hardware-evidence-check with interface/bitrate/report fields and a reduced-hardware trace
peer_request_address_claim|SocketCAN interface plus independent service tool or peer capable of PGN Request|candump -td -L can0|Peer sends PGN Request for Address Claimed PGN 0xEE00 to global and/or specific destination|machbus replies with Address Claimed from its claimed source address and ignores malformed requests|Keep request frame, response frame, and peer/tool version in the report|trace replay fixture plus report proving request/response source/destination semantics
tp_bam_transfer|vcan0 or isolated can0 with an external observer and machbus configured to emit a TP-sized payload|candump -td -L vcan0|Trigger any 9..1785 byte broadcast payload, such as a multi-DTC DM1 or chosen TP demo|TP.CM BAM PGN 0xEC00 followed by ordered TP.DT PGN 0xEB00 frames with the advertised target PGN|Keep the BAM control frame and first/last DT frames unless the complete short stream is needed|fixture test or trace replay notes proving packet count, target PGN, and source address
etp_connection_transfer|vcan0 or isolated can0 plus an external observer and an machbus scenario that emits a payload above the TP size range|candump -td -L vcan0|Trigger an extended connection-mode transfer large enough to use ETP rather than TP|ETP.CM RTS CTS DPO and EOMA plus ordered ETP.DT frames are visible with stable endpoints and target PGN|Keep RTS CTS first DPO first DT last DT and EOMA unless the full stream is needed for replay|fixture or report must prove packet windows endpoint addresses target PGN and completion
network_interconnect_router|Two observed SocketCAN channels or an isolated dual-segment bench with machbus NIU/router between them|candump -td -L can0|Run translated address-claim plus one destination-specific request through the router while observing both segments|Address Claimed and destination-specific frames appear once on the translated side and bounced echoes are blocked|Keep both segment captures reduced to the translated claim request and response path|hardware-evidence-check plus report naming both interfaces translation table and loop-guard result
diagnostic_request_response|Independent diagnostic peer or service tool on vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Peer requests DM1/DM2 or sends DM11/DM3 clear request to the machbus address|Observed diagnostic response or clear workflow matches the requested PGN and address scope|Keep the request, response/ack, and any Address Claimed setup frames|report must name the exact diagnostic request and decoded response/clear behavior
vt_object_pool_upload|Independent VT/reference peer plus machbus VT client on vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Start the VT client and allow WorkingSet/GetMemory/ObjectPool/EndOfObjectPool flow|VT status, GetMemory, object-pool transfer, and EndOfObjectPool frames complete without local-only assumptions|Keep the minimal handshake plus TP frames needed to reconstruct the pool transfer|add trace replay or protocol fixture coverage for every retained VT frame
vt_object_pool_upload_failure|Independent VT/reference peer plus machbus VT client on vcan0/can0 with a deliberately malformed or unsupported replacement pool fixture|candump -td -L can0|Start from a known active pool, request a replacement upload, send the malformed replacement pool, then send EndOfObjectPool|The independent VT rejects the failed replacement upload and does not accept the previous active pool as if it were the new upload|Keep VT status, GetMemory, malformed transfer envelope, EndOfObjectPool response, and enough prior context to prove a previous pool was active|add trace replay or protocol fixture coverage proving failure response and stale-pool non-acceptance
implement_message_broadcast|Independent CAN analyzer or implement-monitor peer observing vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Trigger selected implement status or command messages from an machbus stack or demo scenario|Observer decodes selected speed distance hitch PTO lighting or guidance frames with the expected source address and payload values|Keep Address Claimed context plus the smallest set of selected implement frames|report must name every retained PGN decoded values and any unsupported message family not claimed
powertrain_engine_trace|Independent CAN analyzer or powertrain monitor peer observing vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Trigger selected EEC TSC or transmission frames from an machbus stack or demo scenario|Observer decodes the selected powertrain PGNs with expected source address scaling and sentinel behavior|Keep Address Claimed context plus selected fixed-frame powertrain PGNs|report must name PGNs decoded values scale checks and unsupported powertrain messages not claimed
tractor_ecu_facility_trace|Independent TECU or service-tool peer observing vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Advertise tractor facilities and run maintain-power lifecycle traffic with source-scoped peer interaction|Observer sees required tractor facility status and maintain-power request response state changes without source confusion|Keep facility frames maintain-power request response and address-claim context|report must name facility class role source addresses and maintain-power state transitions
tc_ddop_upload|Independent TC/reference peer plus machbus TC client on vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Start TC client DDOP upload and activation against the peer|TC status/version, DDOP transfer, activation, and response frames are visible with correct source/destination|Keep status/version, object-pool transfer envelope, activation request/response, and DDOP metadata|report must identify peer TC version and activation result
file_server_read_write|Independent FS client or server paired with machbus opposite role|candump -td -L can0|Run connect/properties/status/open/read/write/close workflow|FS properties/status responses and file operation responses are observed with matching TANs|Keep connect/properties/status plus one open/read or write/close sequence with TAN continuity|fixture or report must prove handle/TAN continuity and file payload length
section_control_lifecycle|Independent Section Control master/client peer on vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Run Ready/PlayBack/pause/resume/abort lifecycle with explicit sequence step id|SC status frames show the expected master/client state transitions and step id|Keep the minimal ordered status sequence proving each transition|report must name step id, pause/resume/abort transitions, and peer role/version
tim_authority_interlock|Independent TIM peer or reference simulator on vcan0/can0|candump -td -L can0|Request/grant authority, send an allowed command, then trigger external-stop or other interlock|TIM status/authority frames show grant/revoke and blocked command behavior without unsafe emission|Keep grant, command, interlock, revoke/block frames plus peer version|report must identify option bits, interlock source, and blocked command PGN
nmea2000_gnss_environment_trace|NMEA 2000 capable CAN interface or gateway plus independent NMEA 2000 analyzer on an isolated bench|candump -td -L can0|Publish selected GNSS navigation or environment PGNs through machbus and observe them with the analyzer|Observer decodes selected GNSS navigation or environment PGNs with expected source address and engineering values|Keep address/context frames plus the retained selected PGNs and analyzer summary|report must name selected PGNs decoded values and why the subset is intentionally limited
